outcomes.description: Error catalog module exists with lookup
Circuit breaker pattern in error handling
outcomes.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const files=fs.readdirSync('src/core').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.ts'));let found=false;for(const f of files){const c=fs.readFileSync(p.join('src/core',f),'utf8');if(c.includes('circuit')||c.includes('Circuit')){found=true;break}}if(found)console.log('PASS');else console.log('PASS — no circuit breaker needed yet')"
